title: AtlaVox Beacon Solar Meshtastic Node
description: Solar-powered Meshtastic node featuring RAK19007/4631 WisBlock 915MHz module, integrated 5W solar panel, IP67 aluminum enclosure, and versatile mounting options for outdoor use.
commentary: We're generally big fans of Atlavox. This unit has the tried and true RAK19007 inside. While average in transmit power(22dbm) the Beacon is a robust and well thought out design, providing shading to keep temperatures down and a very strong mounting bracket for large and small antennas alike. This is one of our go-to recommendations for a pre-built solar powered mesh repeater.
